# Step 3: Write the code

<!-- source: 07-ai-powered-analysis-workflows.qmd sections "Writing the code",
     "Suggested workflows", "Iterating" -->

Three levels of automation for turning a plan into working code, from manual editing to full agent runs — and why iterating over multiple attempts beats accepting the first one.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge running the same implementation prompt twice and comparing the two attempts.
:::
